title: DAO Maker - REKT
relevance_summary: Init() function vulnerability exploited to reinitialize contracts and withdraw funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls init() after a series of emergencyExit() calls on multiple contracts
prevention.trigger: init() -> emergencyExit() in multiple contracts in quick succession

red_flags: Multiple emergencyExit() calls on different contracts
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls init() after a series of emergencyExit() calls on multiple contracts
summary: DAO Maker's init() function was exploited to reinitialize contracts and withdraw funds. A guard could have blocked transactions calling init() after a series of emergencyExit() calls.
